title: PostChef
subtitle: mypostchef.com
description: An AI-powered publishing platform for creators who generate content faster than they can publish. PostChef turns rough ideas and brain-dumps into polished, on-brand posts by learning from your historical writing and applying customizable voice presets. Approval-first, so the creator stays in control. Currently shipping for X, with Instagram and TikTok next.

title: Cinekick
subtitle: cinekick.com
description: Discover movies, concerts and live experiences — and find people to go with. Cinekick connects you with your perfect movie-going match so you never miss a premiere alone again.
